title: Giantess Toki & more
description: This mod added Giantess anime girls that spawn in as part of the village raid and attack players and villagers
body:
Made with MCreator

**Contact info**

For bug reporting or suggestions, here's my discord username: censhucho

**Support/Alternative Download**

[Patreon](https://patreon.com/Censhucho?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink) (free)

[爱发电](https://afdian.com/a/censhucho) (work in progress)

**Warning:**

The Giantess will grief world, so make backups before installing

Require Geckolib as prerequisite


**Spawn Mechanics:**

The Giantess will spawn as part of the vanilla Village Raid
or Rarely at night as a regular mob, Giantess's size will increase with each raid wave.


**Aggressiveness:**

They will attack Players, Golems, and Villagers nearby


**Attack:**

<details>
<summary>Toki</summary>

Total 14 attacks

7 unique melee attacks: 
- Attacks when you're at her foot height: Step, Kick, Sit
- Attacks when you're around her waist height: Gun Slap, Gun Smash, Grab
- Attacks when you're above her waist height: Gun Smash
- Special attack: Eat attack, she has a chance to eat her target if she is below half health and the target is below a certain amount of health (depending on Toki's size), the chance becomes higher as her health becomes lower, and this action will heal her by 1/10 of her total health. Player has to press the spacebar repeatedly to escape.

3 range attacks:
Occurs when Target is running away
- Spit: She will spit at her target trying to slow it down if the target is not that far away
- Drone Summon: She will summon 3 drones trying to catch up to the target if the target is getting a bit far, the drone will have a 1 minute long life timer.
- Sniper attack: She will use her rifle and fire at the target if the target is running too far

4 Breach attacks: She will break blocks if she can't path find to her target after a certain amount of times
- LowerBreach: Occurs when the target is close to her and below her
- MiddleBreach: Occurs when the target is close to her and around her waist level
- UpperBreach: Occurs when the target is close to her and above her waist level
- TrappedBreach: Occurs when the target is far away from her and she's trapped somewhere

</details>



<details>
<summary>Candy</summary>

6 unique melee attacks
- Attacks when you're at her foot height: Step, Kick, Ground Smash
- Attacks when you're around her waist height: Wand Slap, Wand Smash
- Attacks when you're above her waist height: Wand Smash
- Special attack: Eat attack, she has a chance to eat her target if she is below half health and the target is below a certain amount of health (depending on Candy's size), the chance becomes higher as her health becomes lower, and this action will heal her by 1/10 of her total health. Player has to press the spacebar repeatedly to escape. (Same as Toki)

3 range attacks:
Occurs when Target is running away
- Spit: She will spit at her target trying to slow it down if the target is not that far away
- Heart Magic: She will fire Heart bullet at the Target if the target is releatively far away
- Lighting Magic: She will summon lighting at the target if the target is running too far away

1 breach attack:
- She will use her magic wand to explode the obstacles

</details>

**Taming:**

<details>
<summary>Toki</summary>

- You can tame Toki by holding any flowers while sneaking. Toki should: never have been hit by any players, bigger than size 2, not hungry, and not in a raid. If all requirements are met, There is a 1 in 3 chance that Toki will pick you up and kiss you instead of attacking you, and be tamed.
- Tamed Toki will help you attack hostile mobs, but still have friendly fires and will do breach attacks by default. You can configure it in /gts command


</details>


<details>
<summary>Candy</summary>

- You can tame Candy by holding cakes while sneaking. Candy should: never have been hit by any players, bigger than size 2, not hungry, and not in a raid. If all requirements are met, There is a 1 in 3 chance that Candy will pick up and eat the cake, and be tamed.
- Tamed Candy will help you attack hostile mobs, but still have friendly fires and will do breach attacks by default. You can configure it in /gts command

</details>





**Other Giantess's Behavior:**
- Giantess's hp will increase with each size unit increase, default 3
- You can use Giantess's attacks by pressing number key 1 and 2 while riding the tamed giantess
- Giantess's attack strength and range will also increase with size.
- Toki has a chance to celebrate if she kills her intended target
- Giantess has a chance to belch if she ate her target
- Giantess's Stomach will growl as her health reaches below half, indicating she can now eat
- Giantess's clothing will get damaged as she loses her health, and won't go back when she's healed


**Other Mechanics:**
- You can increase/decrease Giantess's size by right-clicking it with the Enchanted golden apple or nether star. (Creative Only)
- You can disable any Giantess's Behavior by using /gts command, a GUI will guide you
